text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some fan mail has arrived for Air Groove. I try to
give it to her before our meeting, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
choice_data_list: You're not happy to get fan mail?
You're not happy to get fan mail?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You fool. Why wouldn't I be happy?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But that's all the more reason I must temper my
reactions.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
People don't wish to see me titter with
appreciation. Their desire is to watch me preside
as the Empress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The best way to repay my fans is to uphold that
ideal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's why I must remain disciplined as I go about
my day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I expect those who work with me to act
accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Now then, shall we start the meeting?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of the day, I sense that Air Groove
behaves in an even more refined manner than
usual.
